facts.claim: Proprietary 9-criterion graded (+/-) MEWS/NEWS2-style early-warning score: FR, temperatura, PAS, FC, nivel de consciencia, dor numerica 0-10, dor comportamental 3-12, SpO2-regular, SpO2-DPOC.

RULE-010 aggregate: any criterion grade2(+/-)=>AMARELO, grade3(+/-)=>VERMELHO; else sum-band 0-7 NEUTRO/8-14 AMARELO/15-21 VERMELHO. Payload overwritten each loop pass so a later lower-grade criterion can downgrade an earlier VERMELHO to AMARELO.
Both pain sub-scores' top band is unreachable from buggy chained comparisons (`7<=dor>10`, `10<=sinais>12`); severe pain 7-10 / 10-12 scores 0. clinical_impact: high.
Facade RULE-011 gives PT-BR alerta+recomendacoes+intervencoes only for criterio_1-3; criterio_4-9 are label-only, empty clinical guidance.
criterio_8 (regular) and criterio_9 (DPOC) both read saturacao_o2, no mutual exclusivity, both summed in RULE-010 (double-weighted SpO2); criterio_8 also inverts NEWS2 intent (sato2>96 -> 2+).
Every SinaisVitais create unconditionally auto-creates a linked PioraClinica record for the encounter, regardless of vital values, immediately before the Sepse auto-create.

Histogram, 12 rules. status: OK=5(001,003,005,009,012) DISCREPANCY=6(002,004,006,007,008,010) AMBIGUOUS=1(011). type: scoring=9 decision-tree=1(010) workflow=2(011,012). verdict: DISCREPANCY=7 UNVERIFIABLE=4 NOT_APPLICABLE=1.

constraints.text: MUST NOT port last-writer-wins overwrite of RULE-010 — a VERMELHO trigger must never be silently downgraded by a lower-severity criterion evaluated later.
Preserve PT-BR vocabulary (enums, alert colors, label strings) verbatim, accents included, in v2 docs referencing this scale.

load_bearing_rules.what: Temp sub-score; coverage gap 37.9<t<38.0 falls to 0.
PAS sub-score, all 6 bands; PAS=80 scores 3- vs facade label <80.
FC sub-score; 2- band commented out, fc==50 shadowed to 1-.
NRS pain sub-score; 3+ band unreachable (buggy chained compare).
Behavioral pain sub-score; same unreachable-top-band bug as 006.
SpO2 (COPD), high-SpO2 intentionally penalized; status OK, verdict DISCREPANCY vs NEWS2 Scale2.
Aggregates 9 sub-scores to NEUTRO/AMARELO/VERMELHO; overwrite+sign-loss+dead-band defects.
Vital-signs create unconditionally spawns PioraClinica record per encounter.

systemic_issues.issue: Sign-loss in aggregation: soma+=int(criterio[0]) drops +/- direction.
Last-writer-wins overwrite lets later lower-grade criterion downgrade an earlier VERMELHO.
Dead code: unreachable pain top-bands, commented-out FC 2- band, unreachable 15-21 sum band.
Facade/predicate boundary drift: PAS<80 label vs pas<=80 code.
Field reuse: criterio_8/9 both consume saturacao_o2, double-weighting SpO2.
Copy-paste text bug: taquipneia-grave intervencoes references bradipneia cause text.

domain_feeds.early-warning-scores: primary aggregate (RULE-010) with per-criterion (001-009) + facade (011) layers
domain_feeds.pharmaco: criterio_6/7 pain -> analgesia interventions in RULE-011
domain_feeds.sepsis: RULE-011 intervencoes trigger sepsis-protocol on organ dysfunction
domain_feeds.governance: RULE-010/011 severity-precedence and label defects are RATIFY candidates

open_questions: Is criterio_8's sato2>96 -> 2+ intentional 'hiperoxia' flag or a COPD-path copy artifact?
Should RULE-010 use max-severity-wins and preserve sign? RATIFY-band design decision.
